_meta.purpose: Ingredient knowledge. Teaches the app what an ingredient IS. Add an entry here and recipes can use it.

fields.aliases: matched against recipe ingredient lines; the longest match wins
fields.provides: property flags inherited from parent categories (protein, collagen_rich, sugar, salt, acid, fat_solid, fat_liquid, water, starch, aromatic...)
fields.prep_verb: how it is prepped, shown in the timeline
fields.cut_role: braise | quick | mince — only on meat cuts; drives cut-aware reasoning
fields.parent: the broader ingredient this is a kind of; 'pork ribs' has parent 'pork'

taste_rules._comment: How the six-axis flavour profile is derived from an ingredient's flags.

ingredients.name: Chicken Drumstick
ingredients.cut_note: dark meat on the bone — forgiving

ingredients.name: Chicken Wing
ingredients.cut_note: skin and collagen — crisps well, stays moist

ingredients.name: Whole Chicken
ingredients.cut_note: the whole bird — poach, roast or braise

ingredients.name: Pomfret
ingredients.cut_note: steam whole — sweet, delicate white flesh

ingredients.name: Red Snapper
ingredients.cut_note: firm white flesh — the fish-head-curry fish

ingredients.name: Mackerel
ingredients.cut_note: oily and robust — stands up to sambal and grilling

ingredients.name: Threadfin
ingredients.cut_note: prized for steaming — sweet and tender

ingredients.name: Grouper
ingredients.cut_note: meaty and gelatinous — good for soup and steaming

ingredients.name: Tuna
ingredients.cut_note: firm and steak-like — sear it, don't overcook
